message: Hey, how's your part-time job going?
Hey! It's going alright. Just finished a long shift.
Sounds exhausting. What do you do there again?
I'm a barista at the coffee shop downtown. It's pretty busy, but the tips are good.
That's cool. I should drop by sometime and see you in action.
Definitely! I'll make you the best latte you've ever had.
I'll hold you to that. See you around, Marcus.
